quotes.quote: I'm not here to make friends.
quotes.speaker: Multiple contestants
Eliza Orlins
quotes.context: When Jason gives her a fake idol

quotes.speaker: Sandra Diaz-Twine
quotes.context: Directly opposing Russell at Final Tribal

quotes.quote: I can get loud too, WHAT THE F***!
quotes.speaker: Sandra Diaz-Twine

quotes.quote: Wanna know what you're playing for?
quotes.speaker: Jeff Probst
Various
quotes.context: When someone is voted out unexpectedly

quotes.quote: You have made my life hell from Day 1. Forget you. Go home. Goodbye.
quotes.speaker: Sue Hawk
quotes.context: The iconic snakes and rats speech

quotes.quote: I'm not as dumb as I look.
quotes.speaker: Fabio Birza

quotes.quote: I have the hidden immunity idol right here. Any of you want to play it?
quotes.speaker: Tony Vlachos
Tyson Apostol
quotes.context: One of Tyson's many humorous one-liners

quotes.quote: I was not aware Ozzy was running the tribe like his own personal cult.
quotes.speaker: Cochran
Various/Jeff Probst
quotes.context: Ciera voting out her mother Laura

quotes.speaker: Jeff Probst
quotes.context: Greeting tribes at challenges (later changed to 'Come on in!')

quotes.quote: I'll write your name again, and if I'm up there in the final three, you'll still give me the million dollar vote.
quotes.speaker: Parvati Shallow

quotes.quote: You need to get in the ocean and wash your ass.
quotes.speaker: Courtney Yates

quotes.quote: A million dollars IS a lot of money.
quotes.speaker: Yul Kwon

quotes.quote: By the way, I found the idol without any clue.
quotes.speaker: Russell Hantz

quotes.quote: Natalie, can I have your jacket?
quotes.speaker: Angelina Keeley
quotes.context: Asking for a jacket as someone gets voted out

quotes.speaker: Tai Trang
quotes.context: Refusing to use his idol at a critical moment

quotes.quote: That is a hidden immunity idol, and this is a fake.
quotes.speaker: Ozzy Lusth
Tony Vlachos
quotes.context: Tony hiding in his spy shelter to eavesdrop

quotes.quote: You're either with me or against me.
quotes.speaker: Various

quotes.quote: In this game, fire represents your life.
quotes.speaker: Jeff Probst
quotes.context: Before snuffing torches at tribal council

quotes.quote: Once the votes are read, the decision is final.
quotes.speaker: Jeff Probst

quotes.quote: I have individual immunity. I'm safe tonight.
quotes.speaker: Various winners
